query:
ALTER TABLE sasboss_pricebook_items
  ADD COLUMN api_product_id VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Product ID from SasBoss Billing API',
  ADD COLUMN api_buy_price DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live wholesale/Diamond buy price from API (PAYG)',
  ADD COLUMN api_rrp DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live RRP from API (PAYG)',
  ADD COLUMN api_nfr_price DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live NFR price from API',
  ADD COLUMN api_buy_bundled DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live bundled buy price from API',
  ADD COLUMN api_rrp_bundled DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live bundled RRP from API',
  ADD COLUMN api_buy_unlimited DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live unlimited buy price from API',
  ADD COLUMN api_rrp_unlimited DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live unlimited RRP from API',
  ADD COLUMN api_last_synced TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'When API prices were last fetched',
  ADD COLUMN api_item_type VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'itemType from API (e.g. recurring-ucaas)';
command:

  ADD COLUMN api_nfr_price DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live NFR price from API',

  ADD COLUMN api_buy_unlimited DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live unlimited buy price from API',
  ADD COLUMN api_rrp_unlimited DECIMAL(10,6) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Live unlimited RRP from API',
  ADD COLUMN api_last_synced TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'When API prices were last fetched',
  ADD COLUMN api_item_type VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'itemType from API (e.g. recurring-ucaas)';
